title: Kubernetes Architecture and Concepts
learningObjectives: Understand Kubernetes cluster architecture: control plane and data plane
Identify core objects: Pod, Service, Deployment, Namespace
Use kubectl to interact with a cluster
Understand key Kubernetes 1.35 features and deprecations

theory.content:
What is Kubernetes?

Kubernetes (K8s) 1.35 — codenamed 'Timbernetes' (released December 17, 2025) — is the N-1 release of the leading open-source container orchestration platform. It automates deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications. The current latest release is 1.36 (April 2026).

Cluster Architecture

Control Plane

  • kube-apiserver: The API gateway — all kubectl commands go through here
  • etcd: Distributed key-value store for all cluster state
  • kube-scheduler: Assigns Pods to Nodes based on resources and constraints
  • kube-controller-manager: Runs controllers (ReplicaSet, Deployment, Job, etc.)

Data Plane (Worker Nodes)

  • kubelet: Agent on each node; ensures containers run in Pods as specified
  • kube-proxy: Manages iptables/nftables rules for Service routing
  • Container Runtime: containerd (default) or CRI-O

Core Kubernetes Objects

ObjectPurpose
PodSmallest deployable unit; one or more containers
DeploymentManages ReplicaSets; rolling updates and rollbacks
ServiceStable network endpoint for Pods
ConfigMapNon-sensitive configuration data
SecretSensitive data (base64-encoded)
NamespaceVirtual cluster for resource isolation

What is New in Kubernetes 1.35?

  • Image Volumes (GA): Use OCI images directly as volumes — mount image contents into Pods without building custom images. Enabled by default.
  • StatefulSet maxUnavailable (improved): Configure maxUnavailable in a StatefulSet's updateStrategy to allow parallel pod updates, speeding up rolling upgrades of stateful workloads.
  • kuberc credential plugin policy: kuberc gains support for configuring credential plugin policies, improving secure kubeconfig management.
  • IPVS mode deprecated: kube-proxy's IPVS mode is deprecated in 1.35. A warning is emitted on startup. Migrate to iptables or nftables mode.
  • Built with Go 1.25: Performance and security improvements from Go 1.25.
  • containerd v1.X — last supported release: 1.35 is the last Kubernetes version to support containerd v1.x. Upgrade to containerd v2.x for 1.36+.

kubectl Basics

# Get cluster info
kubectl cluster-info

# List all namespaces
kubectl get namespaces

# List Pods in a namespace
kubectl get pods -n kube-system

# Describe a resource
kubectl describe pod my-pod -n default

# View API resources available in the cluster
kubectl api-resources

Kubernetes Object Structure

apiVersion: apps/v1    # API group and version
kind: Deployment       # Resource type
metadata:
  name: my-app         # Object name
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: my-app
spec:                  # Desired state
  replicas: 3
  ...
